nodes.label: Constrained Query Vocabulary Expansion
nodes.rationale: The query CLI matches via case-folded substring + IDF with no stemming or synonyms, so wording mismatches return 0 hits; expanding the question against the graph's own label vocabulary (never inventing tokens) prevents the answer collapsing to noise while staying auditable.

nodes.label: BFS/DFS Graph Traversal
nodes.rationale: BFS (depth 3) for broad 'what connects to X' context; DFS (depth 6) to trace a specific chain. Token-budget-aware output ranks nodes by term relevance and truncates at ~4 chars/token.

nodes.label: Save-Result Feedback Loop (Work Memory)
nodes.rationale: Every answered query is saved back into the graph with an outcome (useful/dead_end/corrected) so the next --update extracts the Q&A as a node; graphify reflect distills these into LESSONS.md listing preferred sources, dead ends, and corrections — a self-improving loop.
